title: scabiosa columbaria var. vera
intro: Scabiosa columbaria var. vera is an herbaceous perennial plant, also known as small scabious or pincushion flower, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Scabiosa columbaria var. vera include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused in oil, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
